import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(line: String) -> List<Int>
  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < words.len()
    let word = words.get(i)
    match word
    when Some(w)
      let n = string.parse_int(w)
      match n
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn remove_at(xs: List<Int>, idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    if i != idx
      let val = xs.get(i)
      match val
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn find_min_idx(xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  mut min_val = 0
  mut min_idx = 0
  let first = xs.get(0)
  match first
  when Some(v)
    min_val = v
    min_idx = 0
  when None
  end
  mut i = 1
  while i < xs.len()
    let cur = xs.get(i)
    match cur
    when Some(v)
      if v < min_val
        min_val = v
        min_idx = i
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  min_idx
end

fn sort_asc(xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let idx = find_min_idx(remaining)
    let val = remaining.get(idx)
    match val
    when Some(v)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, v)
    when None
    end
    remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
  end
  sorted
end

fn add_unique(xs: List<Int>, x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, x)
    xs
  else
    list.push(xs, x)
  end
end

fn build_union(a: List<Int>, b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    let val = a.get(i)
    match val
    when Some(v)
      result = add_unique(result, v)
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut j = 0
  while j < b.len()
    let val = b.get(j)
    match val
    when Some(v)
      result = add_unique(result, v)
    when None
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line()
  let line2 = io.read_line()
  let l1 = match line1
  when Some(s)
    parse_line(s)
  when None
    []
  end
  let l2 = match line2
  when Some(s)
    parse_line(s)
  when None
    []
  end
  let merged = build_union(l1, l2)
  let sorted = sort_asc(merged)
  mut output = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    let val = sorted.get(i)
    match val
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        output = "#{v}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{v}"
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(output)
  Ok(())
end
